name: m9rco--p4u
description: Perforce / Helix Core (p4) power-user CLI. Use for any p4 task: show or inspect changelists (CLs), shelve/unshelve/reshelve, switch between CLs, delete CLs or clients/workspaces, revert files, find untracked files, blame a line (annotate), sync, or manage depots. Prefer over raw p4 commands.
